title: quercus × jolonensis
intro: Quercus × jolonensis, also known as Jolon oak, is a rare hybrid plant species of the oak tree family, resulting from the cross between Quercus agrifolia and Quercus lobata. The medicinal properties of Quercus × jolonensis include its high content of polyphenols, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce cardiovascular risk, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Quercus × jolonensis can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
